case_title: JORGE S. YOUNG ET AL VS. JOSEPH WILLIAM TELLEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,324.97 FILED BY YOUNG, JORGE S. HENDEL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT TELLEZ, JOSEPH WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-03-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-01-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, JORGE S. HENDEL, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TELLEZ, JOSEPH WILLIAM $1,274.97 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,324.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CONTINUED TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE SERVED JAN-26-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TELLEZ, JOSEPH WILLIAM
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CORRECT CURING OF SERVICE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TELLEZ, JOSEPH WILLIAM
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-20-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-09-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORGE S. YOUNG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DANIEL HANDEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WILLIAM TELLEZ IS NOT PRESENT. CLERICAL ERROR IS CORRECTED TODAY BY THIS CONTINUANCE NOTICE SENT TO THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, JORGE S. AS TO DEFENDANT TELLEZ, JOSEPH WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-24-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT ADDRESS PLAINTIFF REGARDING PROOF OF SERVICE ISSUE. PLAINTIFF STATES TO THE COURT THE DEFENDANT HAS BEEN SERVED. PLAINTIFF ASSERTS THAT HE ATTEMPTED TO FILE HIS PROOF OF SERVICE BY DROPPING OFF HIS FILING IN THE DROP BOX DOWNSTAIRS IN FRONT OF RM 103. AS OF THIS DATE PLAINTIFFS PROOF OF SERVICE HAS NOT BEEN FILED INTO THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. COURT ALLOWS PLAINTIFF TO EMAIL HIS PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEPARTMENT506@SFTC.ORG. PLAINTIFFS JORGE S. YOUNG AND DANIEL HENDEL ARE PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE IS MADE BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH WILLIAM TELLEZ. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS JORGE S. YOUNG AND DANIEL HENDEL ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WILLIAM TELLEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
